name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to KAYA CLI
labels: enhancement

## Problem

What user or technical problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Why This Fits KAYA

Explain how it fits the local-first, terminal-first, and honest-scope goals of the project.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or trade-offs.

## Additional Context

Add links, examples, or related issues if relevant.
